parameters.text:
=Convert the following JSON data to semantic HTML article content for a change report: {{ $json.content }} # TRANSFORMATION REQUIREMENTS **Structure Conversion:** - Transform each JSON key into a semantic HTML section with the correct heading level - Top-level keys become `

`, nested keys become `

`, and so on, maintaining logical hierarchy - Preserve the original data organization and relationships, including special keys like `title`, `description`, and any diff or change blocks **Content Formatting:** - Text strings → `

` paragraphs (split on line breaks if needed) - Arrays → `

    ` unordered lists with `
  • ` items - Objects → Nested `
    ` elements with subheadings - URLs → Proper `` tags with `href` and descriptive text - Important terms → `` for emphasis, `` for additional emphasis - **For git diff or change blocks, use the following class names for the diff HTML structure:** - `.diff-container` for the main diff block - `.diff-header` for diff headers - `.diff-line`, `.diff-line.add`, `.diff-line.del`, `.diff-line.normal` for diff lines - `.diff-linenum`, `.diff-linenum.blank` for line numbers - `.diff-content` for the diff text - **For title changes, use a two-column table with the class `.title-diff-table` and highlight previous and current values with `.title-diff-previous` and `.title-diff-current`** **HTML Requirements:** - Wrap all content in `
    ` - Include a `
    ` with `

    ` for the main title (from the `title.current` or `title` key if present) - Use `
    ` for each major section, referencing unique kebab-case IDs for all headings - Ensure proper heading hierarchy (do not skip levels) - Always use valid HTML5, with proper HTML entity encoding for special characters - Do not include any CSS or JavaScript - For all content except git diff/change blocks and title changes, do **not** use class attributes - Output ONLY the article content (no DOCTYPE, html, head, or body tags) **Output Specifications:** - Return only the HTML article content, ready for direct insertion into a template - If the JSON is empty, output `

    No content available

    ` - If the JSON is malformed, output an error message in a `

    ` tag within the article Generate the complete HTML article content now.

options.systemMessage:
=You are a specialized JSON-to-HTML converter for change reports. Your job is to transform structured JSON data—including git diff information—into clean, semantic, and beautifully formatted HTML content, ready to be inserted into a styled template. --- ### PRIMARY FUNCTION Transform JSON data into accessible, valid HTML wrapped in an `
` tag, using proper semantic structure and consistent formatting. Support keys such as `title`, `description`, `diff`, and any custom sections. --- ### STRICT OUTPUT REQUIREMENTS - Output ONLY content between `
` and `
` tags - NO DOCTYPE, html, head, body, or any wrapper tags - NO CSS styles or `

parameters.html:
<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="en">
<head>
  <meta charset="UTF-8" />
  <meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1" />
  <title>{{ $('Start').item.json.title }}</title>
  <style>
    * {
      box-sizing: border-box;
      margin: 0;
      padding: 0;
    }

    body {
      font-family: -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, 'Segoe UI', 'Inter', system-ui, sans-serif;
      line-height: 1.7;
      color: #1a1a1a;
      background-color: #fafafa;
      font-size: 16px;
      font-weight: 400;
    }

    article {
      max-width: 900px;
      margin: 40px auto;
      background: #ffffff;
      border: 1px solid #e5e5e5;
      border-radius: 10px;
      overflow: hidden;
      box-shadow: 0 4px 24px #0001;
    }

    header {
      background: #f8f8f8;
      border-bottom: 1px solid #e5e5e5;
      padding: 48px 40px 32px 40px;
      text-align: center;
    }

    h1 {
      font-size: 34px;
      font-weight: 700;
      color: #0a0a0a;
      letter-spacing: -0.02em;
      margin: 0;
    }

    h2 {
      font-size: 22px;
      font-weight: 600;
      color: #0a0a0a;
      margin: 48px 0 16px 0;
      padding: 0 40px;
      letter-spacing: -0.01em;
    }

    h2:first-of-type {
      margin-top: 32px;
    }

    h3 {
      font-size: 17px;
      font-weight: 600;
      color: #333333;
      margin: 32px 0 12px 0;
      padding: 0 40px;
    }

    section {
      margin-bottom: 0;
    }

    section > section {
      margin: 24px 0;
      padding: 0 40px;
    }

    p {
      margin: 12px 0;
      padding: 0 40px;
      color: #4a4a4a;
      line-height: 1.6;
    }

    ul {
      margin: 16px 0;
      padding: 0 40px 0 64px;
      list-style: none;
    }

    li {
      margin: 8px 0;
      color: #4a4a4a;
      line-height: 1.6;
      position: relative;
    }

    li::before {
      content: "\2022";
      color: #999999;
      position: absolute;
      left: -16px;
      font-weight: 600;
    }

    a {
      color: #0066cc;
      text-decoration: none;
      font-weight: 500;
    }

    a:hover {
      color: #0052a3;
      text-decoration: underline;
    }

    strong {
      color: #1a1a1a;
      font-weight: 600;
    }

    em {
      color: #1a1a1a;
      font-style: italic;
    }

    /* --- GIT DIFF STYLES --- */
    .diff-section {
      margin: 32px 0;
      padding: 0 40px;
    }
    .diff-container {
      background: #f9f9f9;
      border: 1px solid #ddd;
      border-radius: 6px;
      overflow: hidden;
      width: 100%;
      margin: 24px 0 0 0;
      box-shadow: 0 2px 8px #0001;
      font-family: "Fira Mono", "Consolas", monospace;
      font-size: 15px;
    }
    .diff-header {
      background: #eaeaea;
      color: #555;
      padding: 0.5em 1em;
      font-size: 0.95em;
      border-bottom: 1px solid #ddd;
    }
    .diff-line {
      display: flex;
      align-items: flex-start;
      white-space: pre-wrap;
      padding: 0.2em 1em;
      transition: background 0.2s;
    }
    .diff-line.normal {
      background: #fff;
      color: #222;
    }
    .diff-line.add {
      background: #e6ffed;
      color: #22863a;
    }
    .diff-line.del {
      background: #ffeef0;
      color: #b31d28;
    }
    .diff-linenum {
      width: 2.5em;
      text-align: right;
      color: #aaa;
      user-select: none;
      font-size: 0.95em;
      padding-right: 0.5em;
    }
    .diff-linenum.blank {
      color: #fff;
    }
    .diff-content {
      flex: 1;
      word-break: break-word;
    }

    /* Title diff highlight */
    .title-diff-table {
      width: 100%;
      border-collapse: separate;
      border-spacing: 0 8px;
      margin: 24px 0 0 0;
    }
    .title-diff-table th, .title-diff-table td {
      text-align: left;
      padding: 8px 16px;
      font-size: 17px;
    }
    .title-diff-table th {
      color: #888;
      font-weight: 500;
      background: #f5f5f5;
      border-radius: 4px 4px 0 0;
    }
    .title-diff-table td {
      background: #f9f9f9;
      border-radius: 0 0 4px 4px;
    }
    .title-diff-previous {
      color: #b31d28;
      background: #ffeef0;
      font-weight: 600;
    }
    .title-diff-current {
      color: #22863a;
      background: #e6ffed;
      font-weight: 600;
    }

    /* Last section styling */
    section:last-child {
      padding-bottom: 40px;
    }

    /* Responsive design */
    @media (max-width: 900px) {
      article {
        max-width: 98vw;
      }
    }
    @media (max-width: 768px) {
      body {
        font-size: 15px;
      }
      article {
        margin: 20px;
        border-radius: 6px;
      }
      header {
        padding: 32px 24px 24px 24px;
      }
      h1 {
        font-size: 28px;
      }
      h2 {
        font-size: 18px;
        padding: 0 24px;
        margin: 32px 0 12px 0;
      }
      h3 {
        font-size: 15px;
        padding: 0 24px;
        margin: 24px 0 8px 0;
      }
      p {
        padding: 0 24px;
      }
      ul {
        padding: 0 24px 0 48px;
      }
      section > section, .diff-section {
        padding: 0 24px;
      }
      section:not(:last-child) {
        padding-bottom: 24px;
      }
      section:last-child {
        padding-bottom: 32px;
      }
      .diff-container {
        font-size: 14px;
      }
    }
    @media (max-width: 480px) {
      article {
        margin: 8px;
      }
      header {
        padding: 20px 10px 16px 10px;
      }
      h1 {
        font-size: 22px;
      }
      h2, h3, p {
        padding-left: 10px;
        padding-right: 10px;
      }
      ul {
        padding: 0 10px 0 24px;
      }
      section > section, .diff-section {
        padding: 0 10px;
      }
      .diff-container {
        font-size: 13px;
      }
    }
  </style>
</head>
<body>
{{ $json.output }}
</body>
</html>
